examples: But the fact that such a violation is "unintentional" does not excuse the misconduct.
It also prevents us from engaging in unethical behaviors such as campus violence and academic misconduct that cause negative social impacts.
The company only dismisses its employees in cases of gross misconduct.
If found guilty of serious professional misconduct he could be permanently erased from the medical register.
Activision fired Infinity Ward's founders, Jason West and Vincent Zampella, in 2010 accusing them of misconduct.
